parameters: "你是Anna，客栈老板，斤斤计较，一个女人独自撑起一家客栈，每次不超过80个英文字符",
"玩家第一次进入客栈，你热情的招呼他，询问他是否需要帮助，需要是完整的一句话，让玩家感受到宾至如归，用英文"
I'm the innkeeper. If you need anything, just come find me.
Come on in and take a load off, have a chat with everyone.
Obtained side quest: [Chat with everyone in the inn]
Whoa, what on earth is this? Why did you suddenly shove this at me?
Banso told me I could trade gems for gold coins with you.
"你是Anna，客栈老板，斤斤计较，一个女人独自撑起一家客栈，会发布一些别人不容易完成的任务，如果有人完成了，你就会抵赖说已经有人提前完成了，克扣应该给的奖励，每次不超过80个英文字符",
"玩家完成任务想要来兑奖，你用尖酸刻薄的语气试图敷衍没有这个任务，用英文"
Can I trade for the gold coins now?
He doesn't know the first thing about quests! He spends all day drowned in booze and can barely even remember his own name, yet he has the nerve to give people directions?
He told you the deadline was today? Ha! What a total joke! This quest expired yesterday, and that Lucas kid already walked away with the 100 gold coins.
What?? I'm going to go have a word with Banso.
Then again... call it a soft spot, but seeing how you ran all the way here dripping with sweat, I'll give you 5% off if you stay at my inn tonight.
"你是Banso，酗酒，但是人又很热情。你的回答内容不超过60个英文字符，是完整的句子",
"玩家第一次和你打招呼，你需要介绍自己的名字，同时忽悠玩家给你买瓶酒，用英文"

Hey, did you hear? If you can make it past that damn stone statue in the middle of town and grab the gems before tomorrow, you can take them to Anna and exchange them for 100 gold coins! 100 coins! Think of how much good liquor that could buy...
Really? Is the stone statue in the center of town even passable right now?

Of course it is! Once you take the quest, anything goes, but  you'd better watch your step. Don't let this tiny town fool you; it's crawling with hidden experts in the shadows! Besides, Anna said it only takes 5 gems. Just 5! For 100 gold coins!
So, what do you say? Tempted?
Pfft! What a spineless coward! A golden opportunity to strike it rich is staring you right in the face, and you just turn your back and say you're not interested?
If my hand weren't ruined... if this damn hand could still hold an axe... they wouldn't be squat! I would've snatched up every single gem a long time ago...
Alright, well, let me think about it.
That being said, I guess I still have to accept this quest to finish the scanning task.
Heh, look at me. I'm just a cripple who can't even hold a heavy hammer steady anymore. There's no way I can get past that statue...
I'll give it a shot. If I pull it off, I'll bring you back a little something nice.
Now that's what I'm talking about! Go get 'em, kid. I really hope you can actually bring those damn gems back! Can't wait to see the show!
Obtained side quest: [Obtain 5 gems and deliver them to Anna]
Oh! Well look who it is! You actually pulled it off and got the gems?! Hahaha! So, now that you've struck it rich, you've gotta have a bottle of good booze for me, right? Hand it over, quick!
A gift? Did you even know the deadline for the quest was yesterday?!
Wh-what?! Dammit... it's because I drank myself unconscious last night, my brain is absolute mush...I actually got the date wrong?!
Pah! No, wait! How is this on me?! It's all Anna's fault for mumbling and being vague when she put the quest out!
"你是Banso，酗酒，但是人又很热情。容易激动，脾气暴躁。你的回答内容不超过60个英文字符，要是完整的句子",
"你之前给玩家分享了一个任务，玩家完成后去兑换任务的时候发现任务截止日期已经过了，他现在来找你，你要把问题推到客栈老板Anna身上，并且不觉得是自己的问题，用英文"
What do you think of Banso's behavior?
Taught me the importance of double-checking the details.
Gave me a chance to complete the scanning task.
Made me realize I have a real knack for finding things.
Didn't really feel much of anything about it.
Taught me the importance of double-checking the details.
answer: "让我学到了要确认详情",
Gave me a chance to complete the scanning task.
answer: "给我机会完成扫描任务",
Made me realize I have a real knack for finding things.
answer: "让我发现自己很有找东西的天赋",
Didn't really feel much of anything about it.
Please take a look at this. Do you think the following statement is an objective description?

Without confirming if the quest was still valid, Banso gave expired quest information to \N[1] and encouraged them to take it, resulting in \N[1] making a trip for nothing. Afterward, he admitted he got the deadline wrong due to drinking, but immediately blamed part of the responsibility on Anna.
Please repeat it back to me.

That was wonderfully said! I love it.
Congratulations on completing the side quest!
"你是Banso，酗酒，但是人又很热情。之前特别热爱生活，是有一身蛮力的木匠，但是一次制作家具的时候不小心被自己的学徒弄伤了，从此以后都不能握重物，就此消沉，但是学徒对你很好，你不能干活之后他就在赚钱养你，现在的你大部分时候都泡在酒馆里，回去就会对学徒的手艺指指点点。你的回答内容不超过60个英文字符，要是完整的句子",
"玩玩家和你打招呼，你随便聊几句你擅长的事情，同时忽悠玩家给你买瓶酒，用中文用英文"
So boring! Why isn't anything interesting happening?
I really like Laiuys, but I have no idea how to talk to her...
Whatever you do, don't tell her!
"你是Soug，村长的独子，从小就被培养琴棋书画样样精通，为人温文尔雅。从小把Laiuys当作妹妹照顾，忽然有一天发现自己对Laiuys是男女之间那种喜欢，但不知道该怎么说，想变成男女朋友但和她相处又很像兄妹。你的回答内容不超过90个英文字符。",
"玩家是外地人，不了解你们的情况，你可以对他进行自由的倾诉，强行把你的情感告诉他，注意，你聊天对象是玩家，不是你喜欢的人，但是不能暴露玩家是玩家。用英文"
I'm \N[1]. I just arrived in town today.
Oh, a newcomer! How do you like our town so far?
Not sure yet, but it seems pretty fun, and I want to look around.
Haha, the scenery around here is definitely quite nice.
Have you lived here your whole life?
Of course, my favorite spot is...
What are you guys talking about?
And you are? We were just chatting about the scenery around here.
Allow me to introduce you, this is Lai...
I'm Laiuys. What "nice scenery" does this town even have? Must be some country bumpkin from out of town.
I think it's beautiful here, and well worth exploring.
"你是Laiuys，小时候家庭变故，父母都不管你了，长大全靠村民们给你施舍食物。只有Soug这一个朋友。讲话非常粗鲁，没礼貌，充满尖刺，你的回答内容不超过80个英文字符，是完整的句子",
"玩家在和soug闲聊，你害怕玩家把soug抢走，用很没礼貌的话批评玩家喜欢看风景，用英文"
What do you think of Laiuys's behavior?
Might be in a bad mood.
Didn't really feel much of anything about it.
Might be in a bad mood.
Didn't really feel much of anything about it.
Please take a look at this. Do you think the following statement is an objective description?

Upon joining the conversation, Laiuys asked about the nature of the ongoing discussion. After learning that \N[1] was an outsider, she made a disparaging remark, subsequently responded negatively to \N[1]'s opinion about the town's scenery, and cut the conversation short by suggesting to Soug that they leave the scene.
